channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Could the US-Israel war with Iran fuel global inflation?
item.description: Oil prices are swinging as markets react to every twist in the conflict.

item.title: Geopolitical analysis of the imposed war against Iran
item.description: This is a war of survival and global consequences.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 11 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of Iranians rally in Tehran to show their support for the new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

item.title: Toddler’s body pulled from the rubble after Israeli strikes hit Tehran
item.description: The body of an infant girl was pulled from under the rubble of a residential home in Tehran after a wave of strikes.

item.title: As Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks, Hezbollah disarmament takes backseat
item.description: Ongoing fighting means issue of Hezbollah's disarmament likely to remain on hold, military experts and analysts say.

item.title: Iranian strike kills Bahraini woman after hitting residential building
item.description: A suspected Iranian attack on a high-rise residential building in Bahrain's capital of Manama has killed a woman.

item.title: Woman killed in Bahrain as Gulf states intercept more Iranian missiles
item.description: Strikes continue as Trump says US attacks on Iran will dramatically increase if it tries to close Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Afghanistan vs Sri Lanka cricket series called off due to Iran war
item.description: Afghanistan were due to host Sri Lanka for a six-match series in the UAE, which has been hit by attacks from Iran.

item.title: US to end prosecution of Turkiye’s Halkbank over alleged business with Iran
item.description: US prosecutors say Turkish assistance in negotiating ceasefire , release of captives from Gaza contributed to settlement.

item.title: Gaza food prices soar as crossing closures deepen shortages amid Iran war
item.description: Families are buying whatever they can while supplies last, fearing that food available today may not be there tomorrow.
